n.description: Number of cups of tea (trials) in the experiment, used as the number of trials in the binomial calculation.

p.description: Probability of correctly identifying the order by chance alone under the null hypothesis, used as the success probability in the binomial calculation.

X_observed.description: Observed number of correct identifications by the heiress out of 8 cups, used as the threshold for computing P(X ≥ 6).
